note: v400: Fixed the Budget paycheck total so reimbursements come off it. A paycheck's 'to pay' and its 'left after bills' now use YOUR share (bills minus anything reimbursed back), matching the hero 'you pay' number — so a $115 check with $5 reimbursed reads $110 to pay and leaves $5 more in your paycheck. Shows a small 'to pay · $X back' note when a check has reimbursements.
